tools.name: customers.chromepolicyCustomersPoliciesGroupsBatchDelete
tools.description: Delete multiple policy values that are applied to a specific group. All targets must have the same target format. That is to say that they must point to the same target resource and must have the same keys specified in `additionalTargetKeyNames`, though the values for those keys may be different. On failure the request will return the error details as part of the google.rpc.Status.

tools.name: customers.chromepolicyCustomersPoliciesGroupsBatchModify
tools.description: Modify multiple policy values that are applied to a specific group. All targets must have the same target format. That is to say that they must point to the same target resource and must have the same keys specified in `additionalTargetKeyNames`, though the values for those keys may be different. On failure the request will return the error details as part of the google.rpc.Status.

tools.name: customers.chromepolicyCustomersPoliciesGroupsListGroupPriorityOrdering
tools.description: Retrieve a group priority ordering for an app. The target app must be supplied in `additionalTargetKeyNames` in the PolicyTargetKey. On failure the request will return the error details as part of the google.rpc.Status.

tools.name: customers.chromepolicyCustomersPoliciesGroupsUpdateGroupPriorityOrdering
tools.description: Update a group priority ordering for an app. The target app must be supplied in `additionalTargetKeyNames` in the PolicyTargetKey. On failure the request will return the error details as part of the google.rpc.Status.

tools.name: customers.chromepolicyCustomersPoliciesNetworksDefineCertificate
tools.description: Creates a certificate at a specified OU for a customer.

tools.name: customers.chromepolicyCustomersPoliciesNetworksRemoveCertificate
tools.description: Remove an existing certificate by guid.

tools.name: customers.chromepolicyCustomersPoliciesNetworksRemoveNetwork
tools.description: Remove an existing network by guid.

tools.name: customers.chromepolicyCustomersPoliciesOrgunitsBatchInherit
tools.description: Modify multiple policy values that are applied to a specific org unit so that they now inherit the value from a parent (if applicable). All targets must have the same target format. That is to say that they must point to the same target resource and must have the same keys specified in `additionalTargetKeyNames`, though the values for those keys may be different. On failure the request will return the error details as part of the google.rpc.Status.

tools.name: customers.chromepolicyCustomersPoliciesOrgunitsBatchModify
tools.description: Modify multiple policy values that are applied to a specific org unit. All targets must have the same target format. That is to say that they must point to the same target resource and must have the same keys specified in `additionalTargetKeyNames`, though the values for those keys may be different. On failure the request will return the error details as part of the google.rpc.Status.

tools.name: customers.chromepolicyCustomersPoliciesResolve
tools.description: Gets the resolved policy values for a list of policies that match a search query.

tools.name: customers.chromepolicyCustomersPolicySchemasGet
tools.description: Get a specific policy schema for a customer by its resource name.

tools.name: customers.chromepolicyCustomersPolicySchemasList
tools.description: Gets a list of policy schemas that match a specified filter value for a given customer.

tools.name: media.chromepolicyMediaUpload
tools.description: Creates an enterprise file from the content provided by user. Returns a public download url for end user.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
